problem id: a7104414
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  00000111 -> 00111000
  00110110 -> 10110011
  01010100 -> 10100101
  01010001 -> 10001101
  01001110 -> 01110100
  11010111 -> 10110101
  11100111 -> 00110110
  01100110 -> 00110110
  00011110 -> 11110001
  01000011 -> 00011100

query: 10110010
predicted answer: 10011011
